창세기 12:1.content: Now Yahweh said to Abram, “Leave your country, and your relatives, and your father’s house, and go to the land that I will show you.

창세기 12:2.content: I will make of you a great nation. I will bless you and make your name great. You will be a blessing.

창세기 12:3.content: I will bless those who bless you, and I will curse him who treats you with contempt. All the families of the earth will be blessed through you.”

창세기 12:4.content: So Abram went, as Yahweh had told him. Lot went with him. Abram was seventy-five years old when he departed from Haran.

창세기 12:5.content: Abram took Sarai his wife, Lot his brother’s son, all their possessions that they had gathered, and the people whom they had acquired in Haran, and they went to go into the land of Canaan. They entered into the land of Canaan.

창세기 12:6.content: Abram passed through the land to the place of Shechem, to the oak of Moreh. At that time, Canaanites were in the land.

창세기 12:7.content: Yahweh appeared to Abram and said, “I will give this land to your offspring.” He built an altar there to Yahweh, who had appeared to him.

창세기 12:8.content: He left from there to go to the mountain on the east of Bethel and pitched his tent, having Bethel on the west, and Ai on the east. There he built an altar to Yahweh and called on Yahweh’s name.

창세기 12:9.content: Abram traveled, still going on toward the South.

창세기 12:10.content: There was a famine in the land. Abram went down into Egypt to live as a foreigner there, for the famine was severe in the land.

창세기 12:11.content: When he had come near to enter Egypt, he said to Sarai his wife, “See now, I know that you are a beautiful woman to look at.

창세기 12:12.content: It will happen, when the Egyptians see you, that they will say, ‘This is his wife.’ They will kill me, but they will save you alive.

창세기 12:13.content: Please say that you are my sister, that it may be well with me for your sake, and that my soul may live because of you.”

창세기 12:14.content: When Abram had come into Egypt, Egyptians saw that the woman was very beautiful.

창세기 12:15.content: The princes of Pharaoh saw her, and praised her to Pharaoh; and the woman was taken into Pharaoh’s house.

창세기 12:16.content: He dealt well with Abram for her sake. He had sheep, cattle, male donkeys, male servants, female servants, female donkeys, and camels.

창세기 12:17.content: Yahweh afflicted Pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of Sarai, Abram’s wife.

창세기 12:18.content: Pharaoh called Abram and said, “What is this that you have done to me? Why didn’t you tell me that she was your wife?

창세기 12:19.content: Why did you say, ‘She is my sister,’ so that I took her to be my wife? Now therefore, see your wife, take her, and go your way.”

창세기 12:20.content: Pharaoh commanded men concerning him, and they escorted him away with his wife and all that he had.
